items.title: MECH-457 H-retention-consolidation: policy-KL trust-region anchor to the INSTALLED policy vs unconstrained refinement, swept over three anchor weights (trajectory DV)
items.note: H-retention-consolidation, the THIRD and final GOV-FANOUT-1 retention leg, completing the portfolio alongside V3-EXQ-788 (H-retention-critic) and V3-EXQ-789 (H-retention-auxiliary-decay). BC-install the raw_view policy to the ~20.9 competence point, then run the SAME reference RL refinement with a trust-region KL anchor to the INSTALLED policy vs unconstrained. Changes the UPDATE CONSTRAINT ONLY. SUBSTRATE GATE MET 2026-07-20: mech457_policy_kl_anchor landed as ree-v3 399b17caed (PolicyKLAnchor; SD-MECH457-POLICY-KL-ANCHOR in ree-v3/CLAUDE.md; 11 contracts in tests/contracts/test_mech457_policy_kl_anchor.py), recorded status 'implemented' in evidence/planning/substrate_queue.json. The registry entry's own resolution.basis clears probe_status substrate_blocked -> buildable_unqueued and states the route is /queue-experiment, NOT /implement-substrate. ANTI-ALIAS, both structural rather than conventional: (1) vs 789 -- the anchor is a frozen deep copy of the LEARNER'S OWN post-install weights and PolicyKLAnchor never sees bc_demo (works with bc_demo=None, contract K4); anchoring via bc_aux_coef would anchor to the DEMONSTRATOR and alias. (2) vs 788 -- the KL term is a function of logits alone and puts EXACTLY ZERO gradient on value_head/value_bins (contract K3), with fan.critic_value_loss byte-identical on both branches. HONEST LIMIT carried from the substrate docstring: the trunk is shared so the critic's INPUT FEATURES do move -- the exact mirror of 788's own situation. use_distributional_critic is False and bc_aux_coef is the constant baseline 0.5 on EVERY arm here, so neither sibling locus moves. COEFFICIENT SWEEP 0.03 / 0.10 / 0.30, TWO independent justifications. (a) COVERAGE: an anchor too weak is indistinguishable from OFF, one too strong freezes the policy, so a single guess landing in either mode returns a confident null about a constraint never exercised at a readable strength. The values bracket the entropy-beta band (ON_ENTROPY_BETA _START 0.10 -> _END 0.03) because the entropy bonus is the ONLY other distribution-level regulariser on the same logits in the same loss, hence the natural scale reference; 0.30 is 3x the strongest existing regulariser and guards the freeze end. (b) THE DOSE-RESPONSE IS THE ONLY VALID PROOF THE ANCHOR BOUND, and this is a substrate finding that changed the design: mean_policy_kl_to_anchor_recent is emitted unconditionally but on the OFF arm it is a HARD-CODED 0.0 SENTINEL, not a measured drift (mech457_explorer_classes.py:1036-1038 reads kl_anchor.mean_kl_recent() if kl_anchor is not None else 0.0, and the control constructs no PolicyKLAnchor). The intuitive check 'anchored KL should be lower than the control's' therefore compares a measurement against a sentinel and reads BACKWARDS. The valid check is WITHIN the anchored arms, where all three measure the same quantity against their own snapshot: realised KL must fall monotonically as the coefficient rises. That needs >= 3 points to be a dose-response rather than a single ordering, which is why the sweep is three-valued. CONFIRMED DISCRIMINATING IN SMOKE: KL 0.054213 -> 0.049129 -> 0.037458 across 0.03 -> 0.10 -> 0.30, monotone=True, spread 0.016755, anchor_bound=True, with the OFF arm at exactly 0.0. train_a2c RAISES when use_policy_kl_anchor and kl_anchor_coef disagree (contract K7), so both are derived together from one source of truth in _make_cfg. NEW GRID BRANCH THIS LEG NEEDS AND 788'S DID NOT -- retention_by_policy_freezing. Unlike the critic swap, an update constraint has a TRIVIALLY-RETAINING degenerate limit: as the coefficient grows the policy stops moving, competence stays pinned at the installed value and retained_fraction -> 1.0. Scored on retention alone that is a vacuous PASS. So the PASS branch additionally requires the arm RETAINED PLASTICITY (realised mean KL > 1e-3 AND trajectory peak >= 1.05x the install), and freezing routes to its own branch -- NOT a PASS and NOT the null, because 'competence is preservable only by abolishing learning' is a real retention/plasticity TRADEOFF finding that either collapse would misreport. A frozen arm also has its criterion marked non-degenerate:false so it cannot be scored as consolidation. HONOURS THE FOUR REGISTRY measurement_requirement CONSTRAINTS VERBATIM: (1) records the post-installation competence TRAJECTORY via retention_probe_every=250 over the 3000-episode budget = 12 readings per arm x seed, each recorded in full, never collapsed to a terminal scalar; (2) the grid enumerates a 'manipulation succeeded and then decayed' branch (retention_consolidation_succeeded_then_decayed) alongside freezing and the null; (3) routing consumes the DECLARED COVARIATE post_bc_foraging_competence first (it selects the requeue branch before any retention branch is reachable) plus the trajectory SHAPE and the realised KL, not the terminal criterion alone -- 780's grid enumerated only a ~0 null and so scored a successful manipulation as a null while this very covariate sat declared and unconsumed; (4) an install that did not take self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a retention verdict and never substrate_ceiling / substrate_conditional / does_not_support. PRE-REGISTERED BANDS (declared, never derived): floor 1.0, RND plateau 5.22, lift target 13.05, BC-expert 32.72, local_view_greedy ceiling 48.05, greedy_oracle 57.2, random_walk 0.933. raw_view ONLY -- 780 measured post-BC 20.933 with 3/3 seeds taking on raw_view vs 0.583 with 0/3 on z_world, and a retention question is unanswerable where the install does not take. Reference build is the NON-REGRESSED 128-wide / 3x budget / z_world detached / credit-replay 3 / topk 32 via baselines.reference_config -- NOT boot.make_on_config() and NOT the 769-falsified ON_ACTOR_CRITIC_HIDDEN=256 / ON_BUDGET_MULTIPLIER=5 capacity regression. DV-SYMMETRY DECLARED PER ARM (mandatory). The DV is the foraging-competence trajectory read through a deterministic-argmax eval policy, so its symmetry group is uniform additive shifts across candidates and monotone rescalings. retcons_unconstrained: no manipulation, it IS the reference. The three anchored arms: the gradient of coef*KL(pi||pi_ref) pushes each candidate's live logit toward that candidate's OWN frozen reference logit, and the reference logits differ ACROSS candidates, so the induced change is per-candidate differential, NOT a broadcast scalar, and it alters learned weights rather than adding a constant at read time. It is therefore NOT invariant under argmax or monotone rescaling and the delta is not an arithmetic identity. The one invariant limit -- coefficient so large the weights never move -- is exactly the frozen case, routed to its own branch rather than read as retention. MULTI-ARM GATE via experiments/_lib/precondition_gate.py with aggregate_arm_gates, so non_degenerate = ANY arm green and one arm's unmet precondition never vacates another's valid result (the 785 defect). policy_kl_anchor_installed and policy_kl_penalty_was_exercised are scoped OUT of the unconstrained control via applies_to: the control is DEFINED by the absence of an anchor and its guard value is a sentinel, so asserting either there would make its gate structurally un-passable and collapse the four-arm design to three. RE-DERIVE BRAKE DOES NOT FIRE: the producer-half autopsy failure_autopsy_MECH-457-gov-fanout-1-cluster-780-781-782_2026-07-18.json records re_derive_brake.fired=false, and this leg is a DIFFERENT axis (update constraint) from the braked ones, with a different null, a different measurement (trajectory not terminal), and a positive control at 20.933 that no braked autopsy possessed. GOV-REUSE-1 CHECKED: decisive readout is the post-installation competence trajectory under a policy-KL update constraint. The enabling substrate landed 2026-07-20, so NO recorded run carries a KL-anchored arm at all -- 780/781/782 record terminal-only competence and no anchored condition exists anywhere in the corpus. Not recoverable by reanalysis -> run. MINT / REUSE, and why NO reuse is attempted from 788's mint. 788 completed 2026-07-19T23:55Z at substrate_hash 953cb8d0..., and 399b17caed edited THREE files under experiments/_lib/** (mech457_explorer_classes.py, mech457_bootstrap_explorer.py, baselines/mech457_retention.py) -- all inside the substrate glob -- so the fingerprint CORRECTLY refuses 788's OFF cell. That is a false MISS, the safe direction of the governing asymmetry (a false HIT corrupts a conclusion; a false MISS costs only compute). This leg therefore mints its OFF cell FRESH at the post-399b17caed substrate_hash, reuse-ELIGIBLE via baselines.off_path_config_slice with include_driver_script_in_hash=False, so V3-EXQ-789 can reuse it if 789 runs on the same substrate. NOTE THE SAME REFUSAL APPLIES TO 789's PLANNED REUSE OF 788 -- 789's queue note predates the substrate move and its stated 'whichever runs first mints, the other reuses' now holds between 789 and 792, not between 789 and 788. Pinned ree-cloud-2 (not 'any') so the mint is cloud machine-class and reusable by 789 on ree-cloud-3, and so the two remaining legs run in PARALLEL rather than one behind the other; a Mac claim would produce a darwin-arm64 mint that no cloud consumer can use. SMOKE --dry-run PASS 2026-07-20: 7/7 arms completed, all 4 boot arms green, gate non_degenerate=True, anchors_ready=True, install_took_all=True, anchor_bound=True, dry manifest correctly relocated out of evidence/ and unlinked. validate_experiments.py --strict --paths: OK, 0 non-conforming, 0 readiness / precondition-recomputability / stale-e3-diagnostics / hold-weighted-readout warnings. CAVEAT for a future reader: the smoke self-routed PASS on a 6-episode toy run, which is a plumbing result and NOT a preview of the real verdict. QUEUE-ONLY: promotes and demotes nothing; MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending. DIAGNOSTIC, excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy for adjudication, read jointly with 788 and 789.

items.title: ARC-110 loop-segregation C2 release validation (CORRECTED RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-707b): does parallel loop segregation lift committed-action-class entropy above the single arena AND a valid same-layer null, measured on a FRESH-SELECT-ONLY DV with a graded limbic-competition gate and divergence headroom?
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING. INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-707b per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-707b_2026-07-20 (REE_assembly fc0ceff52d + 544a0633ab, CONFIRMED / user-gated), which WITHDREW 707b's evidence_direction=weakens on ARC-110 as a measurement_test_design_defect AND withdrew the narrowing derived from it (necessary-but-not-sufficient / conversion route requires learned DA-gated cross-loop arbitration, MECH-448/449/ARC-107). ARC-110 therefore returns to UNTESTED on the single-arena-artefact question -- neither weakened nor narrowed -- and 707c is the venue that recovers it. The DA-gated-arbitration hypothesis survives as biology but 707b is NOT evidence for it. DEFECT (form 2, hold-weighted E3 readout): 707b accumulated committed_class_counts on EVERY P2 env step (707b:1023-1035) gated only by is_p2 with no ticks['e3_tick'] guard, while ree_core/agent.py:5429 returns the HELD action before e3.select() is reached at a cadence defaulting to 10 and MECH-093-modulated 5-20 (config.py:2017, clock.py:52-70), so the primary DV committed_class_entropy_nats was an entropy over a HOLD-WEIGHTED histogram. e3_diagnostics_staleness_lint (form 1) is structurally blind to it (no latch is touched). DISQUALIFYING on both counts: an entropy is a distribution-SHAPE statistic, and hold duration is CLASS-dependent while arm exposure differs by up to +97.6% (s45) / +49.8% (s42) / -23.8% (s47), so it does not cancel; the 663 matched-replay calibration explicitly does not cover this shape (autopsy 699 sec 4d: different statistic class, different arm symmetry, 1-2 orders of magnitude). DECISIVE: the A1-vs-null contrast the pre-registered DECISIVE branch depends on was SIGN-INCONSISTENT across all three divergent seeds (-0.1173 s42, -0.0678 s44, +0.1687 s46), every magnitude within/adjacent to the 0.115-0.134 nat band 699 demonstrated hold-weighting alone can move, and the pooled +0.0153 nats is 8x BELOW that floor -- so the instrument could not distinguish A1>null from A1~null from A1<null and the branch 707b took was UNREACHABLE whichever way the bias ran. THE EIGHT REPAIRS (autopsy sec 8): (1) FRESH-SELECT-ONLY DV -- agent.e3.last_score_diagnostics cleared to None immediately before EVERY select_action, DV accumulated only if it repopulated (v3_exq_785a:525-543 pattern); the random-fallback action (707b:993-997) is ALSO excluded and counted separately, an independent inflation path 707b had. (2) n_fresh_select / n_latched / n_dv_ticks / fresh_select_yield emitted per arm-seed IN THE MANIFEST (not a per_tick_sink: Phase 3 workers POST only manifest_bytes). (3) n_p2_ticks + exposure_imbalance_vs_a0 per arm-seed -- REPORTED, NEVER GATING. (4) fresh_selects_sufficient readiness guard (>= 30 genuine fresh selects on EVERY arm-seed, measured on the WORST cell to match the all() quantifier so the indexer's recompute agrees) so an underpowered DV self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. REACHABILITY CHECKED against 707b's frozen record rather than assumed (699b/62b3f43 found its analogous floor of 100 was THIN): 707b's worst cell had 1409 P2 ticks -> ~282 fresh at cadence 5, ~169 at 785a's measured 0.12 yield, ~141 at cadence 10, ~70 at the slowest cadence 20 = 2.3x margin even at the pessimistic bound. (5) DIVERGENCE-HEADROOM guard (NEW) -- 707b's enough_divergent_seeds cleared at EXACTLY 3.0/3.0 with seed 47 missing the 0.05 floor by 0.00064 (1.3%), on a statistic ITSELF drawn from the contaminated cache path (agent.py:4812 returns CACHED candidates on a non-E3 tick). 707c fixes BOTH ends: the divergence statistic is recomputed on FRESH TICKS ONLY, MIN_DIVERGENT_SEEDS raised 3 -> 4, SEEDS widened 6 -> 8 so 4 is REACHABLE rather than nominal (raising the bar without widening the pool would just convert a zero-headroom pass into a near-certain requeue), and the per-seed margin to the floor is reported for EVERY seed including those that cleared. The identical 3.0/3.0 condition is flagged in 708 -- LINEAGE-WIDE fragility, not a 707b quirk. (6) GRADED limbic-routing readout (NEW) -- 707b's named_channel_routing_live read EXACTLY 1.414214 = sqrt(2) on every arm and every seed (ZERO variance across all 24 cells). DIAGNOSED as a STRUCTURAL CONSTANT of project_channel_range (e3_selector.py:124-177): the projection centers the [K,D] feature matrix and projects onto its leading right-singular vector, so a channel routed as ORTHONORMAL one-hot rows yields ||e_i - e_j|| = sqrt(2) whenever >= 2 candidates occupy distinct categories -- independent of K, seed and arm. It is therefore BINARY LIVENESS ONLY and is retained as exactly that with its framing corrected in the precondition description (the '1.414 >> 0.001' reading is NOT a 1414x margin on a graded magnitude). The MAGNITUDE half of C2's non-degeneracy claim now rests on a NEW precondition limbic_graded_competition_live reading loop_limbic_pref_range (e3_selector.py:1881-1883, the range of the z-scored limbic-loop accumulation across ELIGIBLE candidates, peaked over FRESH selections), which IS genuinely graded in the 707b record: 0.013 .. 3.12 across cells, hard ZERO on A0 where routing is off, and it DISSOCIATES exactly where C2 requires -- s43 collapses A1 1.0931 -> DROP 0.0133 (98.8% loss) while assoc_pref_range RISES to receive the remapped channels. A non-gating limbic_ablation_effect block reports that dissociation per divergent seed on PASS runs too. NO ree_core CHANGE: both diagnostics already exist and 707b already collected them, it just never gated on the graded one. (7) supersedes V3-EXQ-707b on entry + manifest. (8) stamp_recording_core via write_flat_manifest WITH arm_results hoisted to the manifest TOP LEVEL so the multi-arm substrate_hash hoist actually fires -- manifest_core.py:117-131 reads manifest['arm_results'] and nothing else, and 707b nested it under 'result', so the hoist silently returned None and the landed 707b manifest carries NO substrate_hash at all (6 always-core fields missing: recording_schema, substrate_hash, machine_class, elapsed_seconds, config, seeds) despite all 24 cells having good fingerprints. Also fixed: write_flat_manifest was passed the module-level SEEDS rather than the RUN's seeds, so a dry-run manifest misdescribed itself. DENOMINATOR CONSISTENCY: frac_pre_ge2's numerator moves to fresh-only with its denominator (707b divided a now-fresh numerator by RAW n_p2_ticks would deflate the saturated 1.0 by ~10x). RETAINED FROM 707b, re-confirmed not re-established (autopsy sec 3): in_layer_null_live (strict >0 tick count, 1700-18072 on ARM_NOISE vs HARD ZERO on A0/A1 -- threshold-invariant, replication cannot manufacture a positive from an all-zero record; the same-layer null the single arena could NOT construct, the 704b/706b binding constraint, was genuinely built) and frac_pre_ge2 (exactly 1.0 all 24 cells, saturated). The loop substrate is BUILT and demonstrably LIVE -- this is instrument repair, NOT a substrate build, so NOT /implement-substrate. RE-DERIVE BRAKE NOT FIRED: autopsy targets[0].re_derive_brake.fired=false -- the category is measurement_test_design_defect so the counting rule (substrate_ceiling / non_contributory-as-ceiling) is not met, and this re-adjudication WITHDRAWS the 2026-06-29 weakens rather than adding a second, so ARC-110's ceiling count moves to 0, not 2. The naive Step-2.5b count returns 5 for ARC-110, but it does not hold: the 707b entry is this very autopsy (measurement defect, fired:false), and 709 / 711 / 713 / 711-713 tag ARC-110 while testing DIFFERENT mechanisms (learned cross-loop arbitration, ascending spiral gain, bounded parity controller) -- not the 707 single-arena-artefact granularity. The brake stops a claim re-tested at the SAME granularity against the SAME ceiling letter after letter; 707c is the sanctioned V3-EXQ-785 -> 785a / 708 -> 708a instrument-repair shape. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is committed-class entropy on a fresh-select-only denominator; reanalysis_query --readout committed_class_entropy_nats --claim ARC-110 returns 6 manifests (707/707a/707b/709/711/713) ALL flagged UNVERIFIABLE (no recoverable substrate_hash) AND all carrying the readout computed under the SAME hold-weighted defect; 707b's replication factor is unobservable from its recorded emission (no per-tick sink, no fresh-select telemetry, only per-arm-seed scalars) -> NOT recoverable by reanalysis -> run. 708a CONTEXT: V3-EXQ-708a is in flight (claimed ree-cloud-2 2026-07-20T05:23:08Z) having DROPPED its ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG arm on 707b's now-withdrawn authority. It is correctly allowed to complete (its MECH-440 question and repaired instrument are unaffected), but the route-to-ARC-110 branch is UNMEASURED, not settled, and 708a must NOT be read as bearing on ARC-110 in either direction -- it is silent on it by construction. ARC-110 is recovered HERE, not by restoring that arm to 708a. ILLUSORY-CONFLICT CHECK (autopsy 7b): withdrawing 707b leaves NO uncontaminated positive leg for the MECH-439 intrinsic-ceiling reading -- 700d/704b turn entirely on a disqualified statistic, 700b must not be cited in either direction, 700c/704 are SAFE but are readiness requeues rather than ceiling findings, 706b unadjudicated, 708 withdrawn. That reading is NOT refuted but must not be cited as established pending 707c. PROVENANCE NOTE: 707c was copied from the WORKING-TREE 707b, which carried an uncommitted crf_matured-precondition improvement staged by session jovial-joliot-9f904b (13 scripts). That edit is complete and self-consistent and is inherited deliberately; it is that session's work to commit on 707b, and 707c's commit touches only its own new file plus the queue. validate_experiments.py --strict --paths: OK, 0 non-conforming, 0 stale-e3-diagnostics warnings, 0 hold-weighted-readout warnings (707b fires the hold-weighted lint; 707c does not) -- the two lints specific to the repaired defect. 1 inherited anchor-reachability advisory (707b fires it too; non-blocking) covering 8 inherited anchors + the 2 new ones, whose reachability is instead argued from 707b's frozen record in the constants. SMOKE: --dry-run PASS 2026-07-20, 4/4 arms completed, correctly self-routed outcome=FAIL / label=substrate_not_ready_requeue for the toy run (n_divergent=0 against the raised floor of 4) -- i.e. it declined to emit a verdict on an underpowered instrument, which is the branch 707b failed to take. VERIFIED IN THE RETAINED DRY-RUN MANIFEST (707c adds --keep-dry-manifest for exactly this reason: 707b unlinked its smoke manifest unconditionally, so its own smoke was never auditable; used with --out-dir OUTSIDE evidence/ so the indexer never sees a toy manifest): all SIX previously-missing always-core fields now present (recording_schema=rec/v1, substrate_hash=c71e9af54a11..., machine_class=darwin-arm64-py3.13-torch2.12.0, elapsed_seconds, config, seeds=[42] = the RUN's seeds not the module SEEDS) with arm_results confirmed at the manifest TOP LEVEL so the multi-arm hoist fired; fresh_selects_sufficient measured=39 (worst cell) vs threshold 30 = MET; divergence_headroom emitted headroom=-4 with the per-seed margin (-0.031995, -64.0% of floor) recorded; limbic_graded_competition_live evaluated and loop_limbic_pref_range_peak collected on the loop arms (A1 3.2024 / NOISE 4.3112 / DROP 3.3153) and hard 0.0000 on A0 where routing is off, confirming repair 6 reads a genuinely graded quantity. FRESHNESS GUARD CONFIRMED DISCRIMINATING: per-arm n_latched 22 (A0) / 0 (A1) / 15 (NOISE) / 17 (DROP) -- a broken guard would report 0 latched on ALL arms. CAVEAT for a future reader, so a high toy yield is not misread as the 708 defect signature: dry-run fresh_select_yield is 0.67-1.00, far above the ~0.12 785a measured on a real run, because DRY_RUN_STEPS=30 makes episodes terminate in ~10-17 ticks and E3 fires near episode start. The yield tracks episode length monotonically across the four arms (A1 10.0 ticks/ep -> 1.000; NOISE 13.5 -> 0.722; DROP 15.0 -> 0.717; A0 16.8 -> 0.672), and A1's n_p2_ticks == n_fresh_select == 40 is that saturation, NOT a failed guard. At the real 200 steps/episode the yield should fall to ~0.1; n_p2_ticks == n_fresh_select on a FULL run WOULD be the 708 signature and should be treated as one. SCHEDULE: 4 arms x 8 seeds = 32 cells at 250 episodes (P0 100 warmup + P1 50 bias-train + P2 100 measure), 200 steps/episode. estimated_minutes 1600 scaled from 708a's 900 for 18 cells; 707b recorded no elapsed_seconds (part of the recording gap this letter closes), so this is a scaled estimate rather than a measured one.

items.title: MECH-440 noisy-selection-head propagation falsifier (CORRECTED RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-708): does NoisyNet weight noise carve committed-action diversity above a matched-pre-commit-variance temperature control, measured on a FRESH-SELECT-ONLY pre-commit DV?
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING. INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-708 per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-708_2026-07-19 (REE_assembly e0ebcbcecc), which found 708's pre-commit class entropy DV INVALID and MECH-440 therefore NEVER VALIDLY TESTED; 708's finding (supra-floor weight noise raised pre-commit entropy by 0.0 -> washes out at the F-dominated single-arena argmax) is WITHDRAWN and must not be re-cited, and its epistemic_category was corrected substrate_ceiling -> measurement_test_design_defect. DEFECT: 708 read agent.e3.last_precommit_probs (line 809) and .last_score_diagnostics (line 780) once per ENV STEP with no clear and no freshness guard, while E3 select() runs only on an E3 tick (agent.py:5429 returns the held action before the e3.select() call at agent.py:7011) at a 5-20-step MECH-093-arousal-modulated cadence (clock.py:52-70, default 10 at config.py:2017), so each probability vector was replicated by its hold duration (n_precommit_ticks == n_p2_ticks exactly, all 24 arm-seeds). The numel()==len(candidates) check at 708 line 812 is NOT a freshness guard (candidate count is constant). DIRECTIONAL, not merely an inflated n: exposure is ARM-DEPENDENT (A0_OFF and ARM_TEMP tick-identical on every seed while ARM_NOISE_SINGLE diverged +1.7%/+57.5%/+32.1% on divergent seeds 44/45/46). REPAIRS (autopsy sec 10, all six): (1) last_score_diagnostics AND last_precommit_probs cleared to None immediately before EVERY select_action, row recorded ONLY if repopulated (v3_exq_785a:525-543 pattern); (2) n_fresh_select / n_latched / fresh_select_yield emitted as telemetry; (3) per-arm-seed exposure_imbalance_vs_off recorded (reported, never gating); (4) per-seed fresh counts in the MANIFEST ITSELF, NOT a declared per_tick_sink (Phase 3 cloud workers POST only manifest_bytes -- twice-confirmed V3-EXQ-785 and 708, and the reason 708's contamination was NOT recoverable by reanalysis); (5) supersedes V3-EXQ-708 on entry + manifest; (6) stamp_recording_core, INCLUDING hoisting arm_results to the manifest top level so the multi-arm substrate_hash hoist actually fires -- 708 recorded no substrate_hash at all while every cell fingerprint had one. VENUE: ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG DROPPED (708 ran 4 arms, 708a runs 3) -- V3-EXQ-707b returned evidence_direction=weakens on the single-arena-artefact sub-hypothesis with a valid non_degenerate null, concluding the conversion ceiling is intrinsic to MECH-439 F-dominance, so the route-to-ARC-110 outcome branch is settled and is deliberately not offered; ARC-110 is neither tagged nor tested. NEW readiness gate fresh_selects_sufficient (every arm-seed >= 30 genuine fresh selects) so an honest-but-underpowered DV self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. CAUTION: enough_divergent_seeds cleared at EXACTLY threshold in 708 (3.0/3.0, zero headroom) -- one lost divergent seed self-routes requeue. RE-DERIVE BRAKE NOT FIRED: autopsy targets[0].re_derive_brake.fired=false (corrected category is measurement_test_design_defect, so the counting rule is not met); MECH-440's only standing substrate_ceiling autopsy (700d-708-single-arena-ceiling 2026-06-29) was superseded for its 708 target by this re-adjudication. Same shape as V3-EXQ-785 -> 785a, whose corrected instrument returned a clean well-powered null. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is pre-commit class entropy on a fresh-select-only denominator; checked the 708 manifest (only per-arm-seed scalars survive, metrics.json is 46 chars, no per_tick_sink, no substrate_hash) -> NOT recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Queued via coordinator POST /queue/add rather than a git queue-file edit: the working-tree experiment_queue.json carried 4 uncommitted entries (728a/734a/737a/742a) from active session interesting-noether-3f6326, so a file commit would have swept their in-flight work. validate_experiments --strict: OK, 0 warnings (708 fires stale-e3-diagnostics, 708a does not). Smoke: dry-run PASS 2026-07-19, 3/3 arms, worst_fresh=42 of 120 P2 ticks (guard working -- would be 120 under the defect), max_exposure_imbalance=0.288, correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue for the toy run. Script landed ree-v3 2beb6a379f.

items.title: SD-024 benefit-terrain LIVE-PATH efficacy (producer ON vs OFF)
items.note: Validation for the SD-024 live-path producer wired 2026-07-20 (ree-v3 8ac193d substrate + 7f16f25ceb contracts). DIAGNOSTIC. Between 2026-07-16 and 2026-07-20 ResidueField.accumulate_benefit had NO CALLER in ree_core/, so benefit_rbf_field stayed empty, compute_representational_density returned exactly 0.0, and the SD-025 curiosity bonus was 0.0 on all 14432 live calls -- the drive contributed exactly zero to CEM scoring in every live agent run. Arms are producer ON vs OFF at identical seeds/config; the script NEVER calls accumulate_benefit except in its P0 readiness positive control, so each arm's terrain can only be built by the agent's own reward contacts. Four legs: producer liveness (active centers), density liveness, DRIVE liveness (live curiosity bonus -- the decisive readout), and selection authority (CROSS-CANDIDATE range). GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout cannot exist in any recorded manifest because benefit_terrain_live_producer did not exist before 2026-07-20 -- no reanalysis possible, run required. Re-derive brake: 0 braking autopsies on SD-024/SD-025/MECH-232. items.title: MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF re-run under the zworld encoder guard (RECORD policy; adds per-arm encoder_moved_in_p0/_in_ac)
items.note: ZWORLD-GUARD RE-RUN. Re-runs the driver with the untrained-world-encoder guard (experiments/_lib/zworld_encoder_guard.py) wired into its warmup call site. DETECTION ONLY -- no attempt is made to make the encoder train; that fix has a second part (the SD-018 head supervises max(resource_field_view), which decodes the demonstrator's action at chance, 0.2552 vs a 0.2534 floor) and the naive 'enable prescribed P0' is REFUTED in-corpus by SD-070 (prescribed P0 at dim=128 collapses z_world, participation ratio 9.21 -> 1.06). The fix is downstream of the V3-EXQ-783 adjudication and belongs to governance. Root cause (pinned structurally by tests/contracts/test_zworld_encoder_guard.py C3/C4): NO optimizer inside _train_all_on_agent covers ANY latent_stack parameter -- e2.parameters() (18), lateral_pfc.bias_head_parameters() (4), ofc.devaluation_bias_head_parameters() (4) all have ZERO overlap with the 61 latent_stack tensors, so p1_episodes>0 does not rescue it (P1 trains heads DOWNSTREAM of the encoder). Measured exposure, all four drivers bit-identical: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00 (D3_hazard_free rung, seed 42, p0=p1=3, steps=20). Guard sits at each driver's OWN call site, never inside x734._train_all_on_agent, because 737 and 742 import that function and need different strictness. Shared shaper zworld_precondition() gives all four drivers one record shape (strict '>' comparator against a 0.0 floor: bit-identity is the signature, so an inclusive floor would recompute a frozen projection as MET). Diagnosis: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/zworld_bc_install_failure_V3-EXQ-780_2026-07-19.md. STRICT CHOICE = NON-STRICT (RECORD, do not refuse). JUSTIFICATION: P0 here is a SHARED, SYMMETRIC starting point for every actor-critic arm, and the manipulation under test is the ACTOR-CRITIC phase (cotrain on/off x sf on/off), not the warmup. A dead P0 biases all arms identically, so the cotrain-vs-not contrast -- the actual DV -- survives. Further, cotrain=True arms may train representation during P1 via _train_actor_critic, so a frozen P0 does not even imply a frozen encoder at eval. Refusing would destroy a valid contrast. The guard records TWO points per cell (P0 delta and AC-phase delta) and emits a per-arm encoder_moved_in_p0 / encoder_moved_in_ac summary -- that per-arm split is the load-bearing new diagnostic and answers whether AC rescues the cotrain arms. Guard entries go to interpretation.recorded_preconditions, NOT the flat interpretation.preconditions[], because the REE_assembly indexer adjudicates that list arm-blind and would return whole-run precondition_unmet on a run we deliberately do not refuse. Dry-run smoke PASS (exit 0, 16/16 cells; guard fired on all 8 AC cells, identically on cotrain and frozen arms, confirming the exposure is not gated on cotrain). validate_experiments --strict exit 0.

items.title: MECH-163 dual-system recruitment (leg 1) -- strengthened manipulation, AUC gate, powered margin
items.note: Supersedes V3-EXQ-786 (non_contributory / measurement_test_design_defect, failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-786_2026-07-20). Leg 1 ONLY -- ARC-071 (unbuilt) and ARC-007 (STRICT value-flat) block legs 2/3 but neither caused the 786 FAIL and this run exercises neither. ROOT CAUSE REVISED vs the autopsy: the autopsy diagnosed a weak manipulation (0.049365 vs a 0.05 floor). Authoring-time calibration shows the READOUT WAS SATURATED -- FamiliarityTracker.query is a CLAMPED SUM over anchors and at the config-default familiarity_bandwidth=1.0 both conditions pin at exactly 1.0, so AUC is 0.5 BY ARITHMETIC and the contrast was unmeasurable at ANY manipulation strength. Corollary: the autopsy's 'raise practice episodes' is counterproductive at that bandwidth (more accumulation drives the sum harder into the clamp; 786 got 0.049 at accum=6, this design got ~0.000 at accum=10 pre-fix). Fixed by querying at a pre-registered FAMILIARITY_QUERY_BANDWIDTH=0.20; update() keeps the config default (the two knobs are coupled through the sum). The tracker is experiment-owned and wired into nothing, so no agent behaviour changes and no substrate work is owed -- consistent with the autopsy's recommended_substrate_queue_entry.action=none. MANIPULATION (autopsy change 1): env_drift_prob 0.1->0.0 in both conditions (drift decays the signal the practice phase builds); novel layouts differ in GENERATING PARAMETERS not just seed (size 10->14, hazards 3->7, resources 5->2, landmarks_b 2->5) -- all invisible to world_obs_dim (verified causal_grid_world.py:1152-1176, asserted at runtime) and all registrable in the agent's 5x5 EGOCENTRIC view, so the manipulation is observable to this learner rather than only to a global oracle; practice 20->30/layout, n 5->8. THRESHOLD RE-POSED (autopsy change 2), NOT inherited: 0.05 is dropped. Separation is the wrong statistic twice -- not scale-free (units set by the tracker's bandwidth/EMA, so re-tuning the INSTRUMENT moves the gate) and blind to overlap, when 'are these distinct conditions' is a discriminability question. Replaced by AUC (invariant under any monotone transform of the readout, principled null at 0.5), gated on TWO independently-recomputable legs: mean AUC >= 0.70 (substantive, d~0.74) AND SEM lower bound > 0.50 (above chance). Kept GATING so a future miss self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue instead of producing a degenerate C1. Raw separation still REPORTED non-gating for comparability with 786's 0.049365. POWERED MARGIN (autopsy change 3): C1 needs mean-SEM > 0.02 AND Cohen d >= 0.8. Required mean 0.0292 vs 786's unreachable 0.062 (2.1x reduction while n rises 1.6x). 786's SD 0.0261 is used ONLY as a noise estimate -- its 0.0133 mean was measured under a failed manipulation and is explicitly NOT treated as an effect size. PRE-RUN VALIDATION: full-budget calibration (practice=30, accum=10, 2 seeds) gives AUC 0.750/0.833 (mean 0.79 vs the 0.70 floor) and raw separation 0.2167/0.1679, i.e. 3.4-4.4x 786's achieved value -- so the gate clears with headroom rather than by 1.3%. Bandwidth moved 0.15->0.20 on that data for two CONTRAST-INDEPENDENT reasons (worst-layout floor-pinning = 1.000 at 0.15; cross-seed spread 0.0040 at 0.20 vs 0.0488 at 0.15 and 0.3368 at 0.50 -- 0.30/0.50 have LARGER raw separations and were rejected on that same variance criterion, which is what makes it calibration and not effect-maximisation). 0.20 is the upper edge of the plateau declared before any full-budget data existed, and NO GATE THRESHOLD WAS MOVED. DV-SYMMETRY: DV is a rank correlation, symmetry group = monotone transforms of candidate scores; the manipulation changes the world states candidates roll out through, hence their relative ordering, so it is NOT invariant and the delta is not fixed by arithmetic (contrast V3-EXQ-604c). Every run records the bandwidth sweep + per-condition saturation (worst layout, never a mean) as NON-GATING diagnostics, so a gate miss hands its successor the calibration curve instead of a bare 'precondition unmet'. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout recruitment_delta; reanalysis_query found it only on 786 itself, whose manipulation failed (criteria_non_degenerate false) -> not recoverable, run. Smoke PASS; validate_experiments --strict clean (0 warnings on all checks).

items.title: Channel-routing route_range cross-class magnitude replication (linux-x86_64)
items.note: Cross-machine-class MAGNITUDE replication of the channel-routing route_range contrast. Tests whether the Mac-higher route_range_mean direction seen in V3-EXQ-662 (ree-cloud-3, linux-x86_64) vs V3-EXQ-663 (DLAPTOP-4, darwin-arm64) -- 3/3 seeds, sign test p=0.125, not distinguishable from chance at n=3 -- survives at 10 paired seeds on the CORRECTED denominator. PRECONDITION FIXED FIRST (ree-v3 5433e3ab1c): the shared 662/663 driver read e3.last_score_diagnostics per env step without clearing the latch, so every held tick re-recorded the previous selection; measured 974 window ticks behind 110 genuine selections (8.85x). Point estimates were NOT materially affected (matched replay: +0.01% / +0.64% / -0.87%, sign-varying) -- what the defect invalidated was the effective n and any variance/significance claim built on it. 662/663 manifests deliberately NOT rewritten; the fix is prospective. DV route_range is sign-invariant, so the torch.linalg.svd singular-vector sign flip across LAPACK backends cannot confound it, and it is read upstream of the discrete quantizer per the rule never to assert exact committed ACTION streams across machine classes. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is per-seed ARM_1 route_range_mean on a corrected fresh-selection denominator; checked the only two recorded runs carrying it (662/663) -- both predate the recording standard (no substrate_hash), carry only 3 seeds, and their denominator is the defect under repair, so not recoverable -> run. The cross-class comparison is a POST-HOC analysis over the two manifests; neither run can evaluate it alone. Queued via coordinator /queue/add rather than a git append: experiment_queue.json held 4 uncommitted entries from a concurrent session at queue time. THIS LEG: linux-x86_64, pinned ree-cloud-3. Paired leg: V3-EXQ-791 (darwin-arm64, DLAPTOP-4.local). RUNTIME: estimated_minutes=753 is MEASURED, not extrapolated -- 28.23 s/episode on a contended Mac (load ~9.8) -> 37.6 min/cell x 20 cells = 12.55h/leg. Measured under contention, so this is an UPPER bound; an idle machine will be faster.

items.title: MECH-204 Phase 7 (broadcast precision anchor) x SD-076 (waking confidence inflation) -- 2x2 substrate-readiness validation, successor to V3-EXQ-774
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC validation of the substrate landed ree-v3 8ac193d7ed 2026-07-20 (MECH-204 Phase 7 / Option B broadcast anchor + SD-076 waking confidence inflation). Successor to V3-EXQ-774, whose confirmed autopsy failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-774_2026-07-17 adjudicated substrate_ceiling. WHY A 2x2 AND NOT A PHASE-7 ABLATION: the symmetric precision EMA made running_variance track true prediction error BY CONSTRUCTION, so the MECH-173 overconfidence DV was pinned near zero regardless of ablation (774 measured -0.000148 / -0.000918 on its suppressed arms). That is a TAUTOLOGY, not a null -- a Phase-7-only ablation would retest to an identical near-zero result and that null would read as a Phase-7 refutation when nothing had been measured. C1 (load-bearing) asks whether SD-076 makes ABSOLUTE overconfidence expressible at all; C2 (load-bearing) asks whether the broadcast anchor CORRECTS it where drift exists; C3 is the 2x2 interaction; C4 checks ARM_OFF_OFF reproduces 774's ceiling (its ARM_FULL_SLEEP was -0.2097). DV-SYMMETRY DECLARATION (per arm): DV = log(true_error_ref / mean_rv) is invariant under permutation of eval ticks but NOT under changes to rv's LEVEL. ARM_BCAST_ONLY/ARM_BOTH write rv via broadcast_precision_pull; ARM_INFL_ONLY/ARM_BOTH change rv's settling level via the asymmetric EMA. Both are level changes; neither manipulation is invariant. Had Phase 7 been built at the 2026-05-09 spec'd E3-SCORE site, factor A WOULD have been invariant under this DV (a broadcast scalar added uniformly across candidates moves no argmax or softmax sample) -- the V3-EXQ-604c class -- which is why the write-site was corrected to precision space before this run was designed. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (overconfidence_score) is recorded only in v3_exq_774_mech173_rem_suppression_precision_calibration_20260717T152554Z_v3 on substrate_hash fff0845d547b05a7, which has neither Phase 7 nor SD-076 -- different substrate_hash, not recoverable -> run. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: MECH-173 count 1, MECH-204 count 0, both below threshold 2; the named upstream substrate is now BUILT, which releases it independently. Preconditions are REGIME-CONDITIONED via experiments/_lib/precondition_gate.py per the V3-EXQ-785 rule (broadcast/inflation readiness scoped to the arms where they are meaningful; a red arm never vacates a green one). Readiness failure self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a substrate verdict. MAIN DESIGN RISK, stated up front: INFLATION_ASYMMETRY is pre-registered at 0.6 (a 4:1 good-vs-bad-news update ratio, the strong end of the defensible optimism-bias band). 774's ARM_FULL_SLEEP sat at -0.2097, so clearing the C1 margin of +0.10 needs a swing >0.31 log units; the substrate unit-smoke delivered ~0.44 and this script's dry-run ~0.34, so it is plausible but NOT assured. If C1 fails the script self-routes drift_source_insufficient_dv_still_tautological (evidence_direction inconclusive) and the correct successor is an ASYMMETRY SWEEP, not a Phase-7 verdict -- do NOT read a C1 failure as evidence against MECH-204. Deliberately does NOT tag MECH-173: that needs the rem_enabled manipulation this design does not run; a PASS makes a MECH-173 retest meaningful, it is not MECH-173 support. Diagnostic => excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring. Smoke PASS (all 4 arms exercised, readiness gates green, inflation lowers rv and the broadcast raises it -- both factors moving the DV in the expected directions).

SD-070 ADOPTION VALIDATION. Re-run of the pre-fix driver with the P0a SD-070 z_world encoder warmup ENABLED (zworld_p0_episodes=60). Supersedes the pre-fix run, whose z_world was a FROZEN RANDOM PROJECTION: no optimizer group in _train_all_on_agent covered any latent_stack parameter, measured 0 of 61 latent_stack / 0 of 4 world_encoder tensors changed at p0_episodes=200. ACCEPTANCE (from the failure record): zworld_encoder_guard green -- world_encoder tensors changed > 0 on every seed, guard_checked=true -- which is the metric the pre-fix runs failed. Verified pre-landing on both _train_all_on_agent definition sites: OFF 0/61 and 0/4 with the guard REFUSING, ON 4/4 world_encoder with the guard PASSING (z_self untouched, per SD-070 contract C5). PHASED TRAINING: P0a (SD-070 encoder) -> P0b (e2 warmup, now over a meaningful z_world) -> P1 -> P2; the ordering is load-bearing because e2 regresses on z_world. Arm fingerprints now carry zworld_p0_episodes, so no pre-fix banked arm can cache-HIT these cells. THIS DRIVER: the ree-latent policy-head competence probe -- the run that FIRST measured the defect (0 of 61 tensors; ppo_ree_latent D3 foraging 0.217 on the resulting frozen random projection). Its readout is the one most directly invalidated by an untrained z_world, so it is the sharpest test of whether the fix changes the science and not just the guard bit. Dry-run post-fix already flips readiness_met False -> True.

items.title: MECH-448 (ARC-107) rank-preserving F->eligibility demotion falsifier -- INSTRUMENT REPAIR of 689d (fresh-select DV + distinct/gating noise control + substrate-invariance assert)
items.note: INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-689d (same scientific question, alphabetic suffix -- the sanctioned 785->785a / 708->708a shape), whose PASS was WITHDRAWN 2026-07-20 by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-689d_2026-07-20.{md,json} (REE_assembly 2e6cc2569b): non_contributory / measurement_test_design_defect, MECH-448 reverted provisional -> candidate, genuine_exp_count 1 -> 0. The entire 689d finding rested on C_PRIMARY (committed-action-class entropy strict-above BOTH collapsed controls), invalid on THREE INDEPENDENT grounds -- all three are repaired here, because defects 2 and 3 SURVIVE a DV repair and fixing only the DV would reproduce a differently-broken PASS. (1) HOLD-WEIGHTED DV: 689d accumulated selected_class_counts per env step (:598; pool at :535) while agent.py:5430 returns the HELD action on not ticks['e3_tick'], so both histograms were weighted by hold duration (cadence default 10) -- DISQUALIFYING for a distribution-shape statistic. FIXED: every per-selection quantity (committed class, proposer pool, cand_world_pairwise_dist, and ALL last_score_diagnostics reads) is gated on a GENUINE E3 selection via a substrate-inert SENTINEL KEY -- the 699b mechanism (ree-v3 2d3a249e01), deliberately chosen over the 785a '= None' clear because nulling _last_selected_trajectory changes substrate behaviour via post_action_update (e3_selector.py:3224 via agent.py:8006). n_fresh_select / n_latched / fresh_select_yield / replication_factor emitted per cell; 689d's hold-weighted DV retained as a NAMED SECONDARY (occupancy_class_entropy) so the defect magnitude is MEASURED, not asserted (smoke shows replication_factor 1.88-3.00 and materially different entropies). (2) VACUOUS MATCHED-NOISE CONTROL: ARM_MATCHED_NOISE (T=2.5) was BIT-IDENTICAL to ARM_PROPOSER_CTRL on every metric on all 3 seeds -- temperature is inert on the deterministic-argmin committed path (the substrate says so at e3_selector.py:2685) -- so the 'NOT noise-as-diversity' half of C_PRIMARY never tested anything, and 'strict above BOTH X and Y' degraded SILENTLY to 'strict above X'. The pre-registered guard matched_noise_verified_lifting:false fired and did NOT block the PASS. FIXED three ways: the noise arm is re-instantiated on MECH-439 Factor B (use_gap_scaled_commit_temperature=True), where _gap_scaled_commit_pick is a real torch.multinomial on the COMMITTED path (verified independent of Factor A -- _conflict_gap_norm is computed unconditionally at e3_selector.py:2771); a HARD control-distinctness assertion (C_CONTROL_DISTINCT) invalidates the run if any two control arms produce identical committed-class count vectors; and matched_noise_verified_lifting is now GATING (C_NOISE_LIFTS -> matched_noise_control_unmeetable) rather than informational. Smoke CONFIRMS the repair: the two proposer arms are now distinct (selE 1.0114 vs 1.5650, gap_scaled_commit_active_frac 1.00 in the noise arm and 0.00 elsewhere), where in 689d they were identical. Factor B appears ONLY in the noise control and ONLY as a noise generator -- it is NOT a mechanism under test, and all other MECH-439 levers stay OFF on every arm. (3) INTRA-RUN SUBSTRATE DIVERGENCE (NEW defect class): ARM_ON seeds 43/44 ran on substrate_hash fc6d17ce... while every control AND ARM_ON seed 42 ran on 19b4073c... -- ree_core was edited on the Mac mid-run on 2026-06-21. The split maps onto the finding exactly: the ONLY properly-controlled seed (42) FAILS C_PRIMARY, so C_PRIMARY had ZERO validly-controlled seeds. FIXED: C_SUBSTRATE_INVARIANT requires the set of per-cell arm_fingerprint.substrate_hash values to have cardinality exactly 1, else the run is invalid; and this entry is PINNED to a cloud worker at a committed checkout rather than machine_affinity 'any' -- 689d's note claimed 'Pinned ree-cloud-3' but its affinity was in fact 'any', which is exactly how the Mac claimed it and ran it against a live checkout. (4) POWER: 4 seeds (was 3) with MIN_SEEDS_FOR_PASS 3-of-4 (was 2-of-3, which let one lucky seed carry the finding), and P1 runs until each cell banks 200 GENUINE selections (N_FRESH_SELECT_TARGET, a GATING readiness precondition) -- which also removes the 689d 7.0x arm-exposure asymmetry BY CONSTRUCTION rather than modelling it, since equal env steps do not imply equal selections (689d ARM_ON seed 44: 238 env steps = ~24 genuine selections against a 0.187-nat deciding margin). (5) RECORDING: always-core stamped via stamp_recording_core AFTER arm_results assembly so substrate_hash HOISTS from the per-cell fingerprints -- 689d was missing recording_schema, top-level substrate_hash, machine_class and elapsed_seconds. DELIBERATELY UNCHANGED, per the autopsy's separate adjudication that all three survive on threshold-invariance: C_READINESS (EXCLUDED_COUNT_FLOOR=0.0, strict >), C_RANK_PRESERVING (saturated 1.0), and C_SAFETY (realized per-env-step harm from env.step -- harm is deliberately NOT fresh-gated, the env step being the correct denominator for a harm RATE). Only the instrument feeding them is repaired. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: literal count is 2 for MECH-448 (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-699_2026-07-20 and failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-689d_2026-07-20), meeting RE_DERIVE_BRAKE_THRESHOLD, but recorded NOT FIRED by the autopsy (sec 10) and user-ratified at the Step 8 gate: the category is measurement_test_design_defect NOT substrate_ceiling, the substrate is demonstrably BUILT (readiness / rank-preservation / safety all survive), and the corrected re-run asks a genuinely different question -- 'does the effect exist when measured correctly' -- rather than re-posing the same question against the same ceiling. Refusing instrument repair on a claim whose substrate is already proven built would invert the brake's purpose. GOV-REUSE-1: not recoverable from existing manifests -- the decisive readout (fresh-selection-gated committed-class entropy under a distinct, verified-lifting noise control on a single substrate build) exists in NO recorded run; 689d's own manifest is the withdrawn one and carries neither the freshness telemetry nor a reachable control, and 689h/689g are synthetic-bank selector-level runs with no env loop. PASS (demotion_converts_committed_diversity) restores the embodied env-loop pathway the 689d withdrawal removed -- 689h survives but is purpose:diagnostic, tests demotion_x_gonogo_additive rather than the standalone conversion assertion, and shares the synthetic-bank pathway with 689g. Off-ramps: cardinality>1 -> intra_run_substrate_divergence_invalid; identical controls -> control_arms_not_distinct_invalid; short effective N / under-trained / all-admit envelope -> substrate_not_ready_requeue; non-lifting control -> matched_noise_control_unmeetable; rank frac<1.0 -> rank_alteration_not_prefix_diagnose; no lift -> conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_demotion (MECH-449 / V4 off-ramp). ONLY a C_SAFETY fail WEAKENS. claim_ids=[MECH-448] only; ARC-107/MECH-447/MECH-449/MECH-439/Q-078 untouched; MECH-448 stays candidate (PROMOTES NOTHING; governance applies). validate_experiments --strict PASS (0 warnings, incl. 0 stale-e3-diagnostics and 0 hold-weighted-readout -- both lints fired on 689d); dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (4 arms, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy budget as designed, dry manifest relocated out of evidence/). Working-tree-vs-HEAD queue audit clean; committed via ree_commit.py (private index) because parallel sessions hold STAGED experiment scripts in the shared index. C_PRIMARY ESTIMATOR (residual consistency fix, 2026-07-20): C_PRIMARY gates on selected_action_class_entropy_mm -- the MILLER-MADOW bias-corrected Shannon entropy, H_MM = H_plugin + (K_obs-1)/(2N), with K_obs the number of OBSERVED (non-zero) classes -- NOT on the plug-in value. The uncorrected plug-in estimator is still emitted per cell as selected_action_class_entropy, with miller_madow_correction_nats beside it, a top-level c_primary_estimator block, and a summary.miller_madow_audit block carrying the per-cell corrections plus the counterfactual verdict under the uncorrected estimator (estimator_changes_verdict). Ported verbatim from the LANDED sibling V3-EXQ-699c (experiments/v3_exq_699c_pcomp_demotion_x_gonogo_fixed_n.py), which independently adopted the same two fixes for the same DV class in the same 699/689 defect lineage. 699c's split governs: the FIXED-N stopping rule is 'the load-bearing fix' (differential bias zero BY CONSTRUCTION rather than by correction) and Miller-Madow is 'belt and braces' for the residual. 689i ALREADY CARRIED the load-bearing half -- every cell banks exactly N_FRESH_SELECT_TARGET=200 genuine selections and P1 stops at the target -- so N is equal across cells by construction and this closes ONLY the residual K_obs-driven term. It is a CONSISTENCY FIX, NOT a defect repair: at N=200 the correction is (K_obs-1)/400, i.e. 0.0025 nats at K_obs=2 up to 0.0100 at K_obs=5, so the worst plausible arm differential (K_obs=5 noise vs K_obs=2 ON -- the occupancy split reproduced in the dry-run smoke) is ~0.0075 nats: ~4.0% of the 689d deciding margin (0.187 nats) and 2.5% of C3_SELECTED_ENTROPY_FLOOR (0.3). Real, and pointing in the direction C_PRIMARY tests, but NOT decisive alone. C3_SELECTED_ENTROPY_FLOOR is DELIBERATELY NOT re-tuned to compensate and the C_READINESS / C_RANK_PRESERVING / C_SAFETY predicates are UNTOUCHED -- the autopsy adjudicated all three as surviving on threshold-invariance, and absorbing a <=0.01-nat correction into a threshold would quietly undo that adjudication. occupancy_class_entropy and proposer_pool_class_entropy stay PLUG-IN: the former must remain byte-comparable with 689d's recorded hold-weighted DV, which is the entire reason it is retained, so occupancy_minus_fresh_entropy_delta stays plug-in-minus-plug-in (like-for-like). Edited IN PLACE rather than minted as 689j because the coordinator /queue/active confirmed 689i status=pending / claimed_by=None with no manifest and no runner_status entry at 2026-07-20T09:47Z, re-verified immediately before commit. Re-validated: validate_experiments --strict PASS (0 warnings, unchanged from pre-edit); estimator arithmetic unit-checked against the four K_obs cases; dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (4 arms, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy budget as designed, dry manifest relocated out of evidence/, estimator_changes_verdict=false).

items.title: Env-difficulty competence-recovery sweep re-run under the zworld encoder guard (STRICT policy; ree arm refused per rung, PPO/oracle/random preserved)
items.note: ZWORLD-GUARD RE-RUN. Re-runs the driver with the untrained-world-encoder guard (experiments/_lib/zworld_encoder_guard.py) wired into its warmup call site. DETECTION ONLY -- no attempt is made to make the encoder train; that fix has a second part (the SD-018 head supervises max(resource_field_view), which decodes the demonstrator's action at chance, 0.2552 vs a 0.2534 floor) and the naive 'enable prescribed P0' is REFUTED in-corpus by SD-070 (prescribed P0 at dim=128 collapses z_world, participation ratio 9.21 -> 1.06). The fix is downstream of the V3-EXQ-783 adjudication and belongs to governance. Root cause (pinned structurally by tests/contracts/test_zworld_encoder_guard.py C3/C4): NO optimizer inside _train_all_on_agent covers ANY latent_stack parameter -- e2.parameters() (18), lateral_pfc.bias_head_parameters() (4), ofc.devaluation_bias_head_parameters() (4) all have ZERO overlap with the 61 latent_stack tensors, so p1_episodes>0 does not rescue it (P1 trains heads DOWNSTREAM of the encoder). Measured exposure, all four drivers bit-identical: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00 (D3_hazard_free rung, seed 42, p0=p1=3, steps=20). Guard sits at each driver's OWN call site, never inside x734._train_all_on_agent, because 737 and 742 import that function and need different strictness. Shared shaper zworld_precondition() gives all four drivers one record shape (strict '>' comparator against a 0.0 floor: bit-identity is the signature, so an inclusive floor would recompute a frozen projection as MET). Diagnosis: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/zworld_bc_install_failure_V3-EXQ-780_2026-07-19.md. STRICT CHOICE = STRICT (REFUSE the arm). JUSTIFICATION: its P0 comment claimed a 'world-model warmup' mirroring 728 (corrected in this change), and its ree_trained_allon arm is presented as a TRAINED REE agent compared against PPO / oracle / random. That arm's premise requires a learned world representation, so it is refused. As with 728a the refusal is ARM-scoped and, because this is a SWEEP, also RUNG-scoped: a red ree arm on one rung vacates neither other rungs nor other arms. This matters more here than anywhere else in the fanout, because vanilla_ppo (raw-obs learner-adequacy control) and greedy_oracle remain fully scoreable -- the ppo-vs-oracle recovery comparison across the difficulty staircase survives intact and is still live science. non_degenerate is ANY-arm-green. On a PARTIAL run only the GREEN arms' preconditions go into the flat interpretation.preconditions[] (the indexer reads it arm-blind and would otherwise vacate the whole sweep); red arms are carried under per_arm_gate with a preconditions_scope_note naming exactly which arms were excluded and why. If EVERY arm is red the flat list carries them all and the whole-run verdict is correct. Label on refusal: substrate_not_ready_requeue.

SD-070 ADOPTION VALIDATION. Re-run of the pre-fix driver with the P0a SD-070 z_world encoder warmup ENABLED (zworld_p0_episodes=60). Supersedes the pre-fix run, whose z_world was a FROZEN RANDOM PROJECTION: no optimizer group in _train_all_on_agent covered any latent_stack parameter, measured 0 of 61 latent_stack / 0 of 4 world_encoder tensors changed at p0_episodes=200. ACCEPTANCE (from the failure record): zworld_encoder_guard green -- world_encoder tensors changed > 0 on every seed, guard_checked=true -- which is the metric the pre-fix runs failed. Verified pre-landing on both _train_all_on_agent definition sites: OFF 0/61 and 0/4 with the guard REFUSING, ON 4/4 world_encoder with the guard PASSING (z_self untouched, per SD-070 contract C5). PHASED TRAINING: P0a (SD-070 encoder) -> P0b (e2 warmup, now over a meaningful z_world) -> P1 -> P2; the ordering is load-bearing because e2 regresses on z_world. Arm fingerprints now carry zworld_p0_episodes, so no pre-fix banked arm can cache-HIT these cells. THIS DRIVER: the env-difficulty competence-recovery sweep. NOTE V3-EXQ-734a was CLAIMED BY ree-cloud-4 AT 2026-07-20T15:54Z, i.e. BEFORE this fix landed, so it will complete on pre-fix code and its ree_trained_allon arm is guard-red by construction -- do not read 734a as a post-fix result. Post-fix dry-run: guard green on all 4 rungs (was red on all 4).

PHASED TRAINING: P0a (SD-070 encoder) -> P0b (e2 warmup, now over a meaningful z_world) -> P1 -> P2; the ordering is load-bearing because e2 regresses on z_world. Arm fingerprints now carry zworld_p0_episodes, so no pre-fix banked arm can cache-HIT these cells. THIS DRIVER: the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF validation. CRITICAL CONTROL SYMMETRY: the bias_head_baseline OFF arm carries the SAME zworld_p0_episodes as the AC treatment arms -- otherwise the ON/OFF contrast confounds the actor-critic treatment with 'the treatment had a trained encoder and the control did not'. items.title: P-comp: MECH-448 demotion x MECH-449 Go/No-Go composition at PER-COMMITMENT committed-class entropy (2x2 diagnostic; 699 instrument repair -- fresh-select DV, levers_compound withdrawn)
items.note: INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-699, routed by REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-699_2026-07-20.json (REE_assembly ac2fb64028). LETTER not a new number: the scientific question is UNCHANGED (does MECH-448 demotion compose with MECH-449 Go/No-Go at the committed-class axis) and only the instrumentation was wrong, which CLAUDE.md's EXQ versioning rule puts squarely in the alphabetic-suffix case; the autopsy records a deliberate dissent from an earlier chip that asserted a new number, and cites the 708 -> 708a precedent for the same class of repair. WHAT STANDS from 699: the PASS and the whole C1 readiness battery -- its single load-bearing criterion is readiness-only, the C1e/C1f non-vacuity floors are literally 0.0, and the active-frac / frac_pre_ge2 gates saturate at exactly 1.0, so all seven preconditions are threshold-invariant to the defect. WHAT IS WITHDRAWN: the levers_compound composition finding. 699's primary DV committed_class_entropy_nats was accumulated at driver :882/:899 from int(action[0].argmax()) on the action RETURNED by agent.select_action, once per ENV STEP; on a non-E3 tick ree_core/agent.py:5430 returns the HELD action before e3.select() is reached. The DV was therefore hold-duration-weighted OCCUPANCY entropy standing in for the per-COMMITMENT construct both claims act on (they act at SELECTION). This is a CONSTRUCT MISMATCH, not staleness -- the diagnostics values were fresh (reassigned wholesale at e3_selector.py:2452); the READ was replicated by hold duration. The bias is ALIGNED with the hypothesis (ARM_OFF is the reference for every delta, and an unarmed agent perseverates longer, depressing its occupancy entropy and inflating every d_* including d_both), so no sign-check is available and the CORRECTED SIGN IS UNKNOWN. This is a WITHDRAWAL, NOT A REVERSAL: do not restate 'the levers compound' or 'safe to co-arm' in EITHER direction pending this run -- 699's own CANCEL branch was never ruled out by an uncontaminated measurement either. WHAT 699b CHANGES (autopsy routing requirements 1-8): (1) every per-selection quantity -- committed class, consumed-summary divergence, lateral_pfc bias, CRF state, and BOTH lever diagnostics -- is recorded only on a genuine fresh E3 selection; (2) n_fresh_select / n_latched / fresh_select_yield / replication_factor emitted per arm-seed, the single field whose absence made 699 unrecoverable (n_p2_ticks counts ENV STEPS and swings 3.8x within one seed); (3) BOTH readouts emitted and kept distinct -- committed_class_entropy_nats (PRIMARY, per-commitment, the DV the verdict reads) and occupancy_class_entropy_nats (699's DV verbatim) -- with the pre-registered composition rule applied to BOTH via _composition_verdict_from(), a matched-replay comparison over identical cells/seeds/thresholds differing only in sampling unit (the method used on the 663 driver at ree-v3 5433e3ab1c). The 663 replay bounded that defect at sub-1% but does NOT generalise here: 663's DV is a continuous magnitude whose replication is near-uniform across arms and cancels in the contrast, whereas an ENTROPY over a class histogram is reweighted directly by replication and these arms differ in HOLD DURATION, the very weighting quantity. The 699-instrumented verdict is DIAGNOSTIC CONTEXT ONLY, never a finding; (4) hold-duration mean/median/max/histogram per arm-seed, which directly tests the perseveration argument (ARM_OFF longest holds confirms it; flat bounds it); (5) selected_class_entropy_nats DROPPED -- under 699's instrumentation it equalled the primary DV to 6dp on ALL 12 arm-seeds and carried zero independent information; (6) C1 battery UNCHANGED in predicates and thresholds, the only change being the active-frac DENOMINATOR (now n_fresh_select, the honest denominator for a per-selection gate; the smoke confirms armed arms read exactly 1.0 and unarmed exactly 0.0, reproducing 699's saturation), plus ONE ADDED gate C1(g) fresh-selection sufficiency which 699 could not have had; (7) supersedes V3-EXQ-699 and V3-EXQ-699a on both the queue entry and the manifest; (8) recording core stamped via pack_writer -> manifest_core.stamp_recording_core. DELIBERATE DEVIATION from autopsy requirement 1 and the v3_exq_785a reference, documented in the module docstring: 699b does NOT null the two latches. Nulling _last_selected_trajectory CHANGES SUBSTRATE BEHAVIOUR -- post_action_update (e3_selector.py:3224) falls back to it when _committed_trajectory is None (the ARC-016 deadlock fix) and runs on EVERY step via update_residue (agent.py:8006), so nulling it silently skips running-variance updates and the prediction_error / dynamic_precision metrics on non-E3 ticks with no live commitment; in a COMPOSITION experiment that perturbs the selection dynamics under test and would make this a different experiment rather than a repaired instrument. Nulling last_score_diagnostics is None-safe but also not inert (agent.py:9660 would fall back to authority defaults on non-E3 ticks). Instead a private SENTINEL KEY is stamped into the diagnostics dict before every select_action: select() reassigns that dict WHOLESALE at e3_selector.py:2452 with no early return, so the key survives iff select() did not run; its sole ree_core reader (agent.py:9660) uses .get() with defaults and nothing iterates its keys, so the marker is fully INERT. Same guarantee, zero substrate perturbation. Because the two validate_experiments lints pattern-match on a literal `= None` clear, they fire as FALSE POSITIVES here; E3_DIAGNOSTICS_STALENESS_EXEMPT and E3_HOLD_WEIGHTED_READOUT_EXEMPT are set with that reason recorded verbatim in the script. They must NOT be read as '699b still carries the 699 defect' -- the opposite is true. KNOWN CAVEAT (pre-existing, INHERITED from 699, deliberately NOT silenced): validate_experiments emits an anchor-reachability WARN on the eight readiness preconditions (no assert_anchor_reachable guard). Not exempted, because it has not been discharged -- but empirically mitigated: V3-EXQ-699 MET all seven of these anchors on a real full-scale run, so they are demonstrably reachable rather than unmeetable-by-construction. Flagged for a separate follow-up. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout (per-COMMITMENT committed-class entropy) exists in NO recorded manifest -- 699's is the occupancy variant and is the defect itself, 699a re-emits it unchanged, and no run in the corpus recorded n_fresh_select for this driver, so the replication factor cannot even be estimated post-hoc. Recoverability is explicitly false in the autopsy (no custom_information, no per-tick sink, metrics.json 53 chars, Phase-3 cloud transport carries manifest_bytes only -- thrice-confirmed with 785 and 708). NOT RECOVERABLE -> run. Re-derive brake CLEAR: MECH-448 and MECH-449 each have 0 prior substrate_ceiling / non_contributory autopsies. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING, scoring-excluded. Design UNCHANGED from 699 (2x2 demotion {OFF,ON} x Go/No-Go {OFF,ON}, matched stack, 3 seeds x 4 arms, 350 ep/run). Inherits the precondition-declaration fix (ree-v3 0bfbb42, _min_arm_count) that 699a existed to exercise, since that fix is prospective and already on main. PRIORITY 28 = below the live MECH-457 / zworld-encoder front (30-55) but well above 699a's 5. 699a was priced at 5 on the reasoning that 'the scientific answer is already known, only the record needs repair'; that premise is now FALSE -- the answer is NOT known, levers_compound is withdrawn, and the composition gates the conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK co-arming decision. IN-FLIGHT: V3-EXQ-699a was status=claimed by ree-cloud-3 since 2026-07-19T21:05:38Z (~600 est min) when 699b was queued; it is a FAITHFUL re-run of the unchanged 699 driver and will reproduce every defect above. The autopsy recommends dequeuing it via the coordinator, but that is the USER'S decision and was NOT taken by this session. If it completes, its manifest MUST carry the autopsy's evidence_quality_note verbatim, otherwise a cleanly-adjudicable levers_compound lands on the record and reads as CONFIRMATION of the finding withdrawn here -- the worst available outcome. VALIDATION: py_compile OK; validate_experiments --strict OK (0 stale-e3-diagnostics, 0 hold-weighted-readout, 0 precondition-recomputability warnings; 1 inherited anchor-reachability WARN as above); ASCII-clean (0 non-ASCII bytes); dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (4 arms, 4 verdict lines at 1 seed, 12 at full scale; toy scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed); fresh-gating verified live on the smoke manifest -- yield 0.47-0.78, replication 1.28-2.12, armed-arm demotion/nogo fracs EXACTLY 1.0 and unarmed EXACTLY 0.0 (reproducing 699's saturation on the corrected denominator), entropy_defect_delta non-zero and ARM-DEPENDENT (-0.056 ARM_OFF to -0.389 ARM_GNG) confirming the defect is real and does not cancel across arms; validate_recording --strict OK (always-core complete: recording_schema rec/v1, substrate_hash, machine_class, seeds, config, elapsed_seconds).
